selection_brief: Select a current official photograph of the exact Aqara Camera Hub G350 in a warm residential setting. The device must remain recognizable in both the 16:10 article hero and centered 16:9 library-card crop. Prefer natural wood, warm practical lighting, and an uncluttered homeowner scene. Reject images containing headline text, floating interface cards, diagrams, routing lines, translucent panels, inset frames, progress bars, fake charts, or invented hardware.
crop_note: The official 1920x730 photograph was center-cropped to the TaraHome 16:10 cover ratio and resized to 1600x1000. No generative or deterministic fallback artwork was used.
